habits.name: Smoking
habits.description: Trying to quit smoking for better health and financial savings
motivationalQuotes: Every cigarette you don't smoke is a victory for your health
Your lungs are healing with every smoke-free day
Think about the money you're saving by not smoking

habits.name: Nail Biting
habits.description: Want to stop biting my nails for better appearance and hygiene
motivationalQuotes: Beautiful nails are worth the effort
Notice the urge and choose a healthier alternative

habits.name: Procrastination
habits.description: Avoiding important tasks and delaying work until the last minute
motivationalQuotes: The best time to start was yesterday, the second best time is now
You'll feel amazing once you start
Break it down into smaller steps

entries.notes: Had a stressful meeting at work and reached for a cigarette. Need to find better stress management techniques.
Social situation with friends who smoke. Found it hard to resist. Maybe I should avoid smoking areas for now.
Was watching TV and mindlessly started biting nails. Need to keep hands busy with something else.
Nervous about presentation tomorrow. Caught myself biting nails while preparing. Used stress ball instead after noticing.
Morning anxiety about the day ahead. Need better morning routine to manage stress.
